description_long: This is a single, thick pancake with a golden-brown color, served on a round, black plate. The pancake is generously topped with a white, creamy sauce that drips down the sides in several streams, creating a visually appealing contrast. Scattered across the top and sauce are small, round, purple berries, likely blueberries, adding pops of color and texture. At the center, there are a couple of larger, red berries, possibly raspberries or cherries, serving as a focal garnish. The pancake appears soft and fluffy, with a slightly uneven, homemade shape. The plate is simple and unadorned, emphasizing the vibrant toppings and the inviting appearance of the pancake.
description: A thick, golden pancake topped with white sauce, purple berries, and red berries, served on a black plate. The toppings and sauce create a colorful, appetizing presentation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pancake with white sauce flowing down the sides, two red berries and several purple berries on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights a single red berry at the center and more visible purple berries scattered across the sauce.
description_view_2: Two red berries are prominent at the center, with the sauce and berries distributed evenly across the pancake.
description_view_3: A single red berry is visible at the center, with the sauce and purple berries extending toward the back edge.
